item.name: Slipsnail
item.description:
While it may seem harmless enough, it has a nasty surprise in store for unwitting predators.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Though it may appear defenseless at first glance, its soft, scaleless body conceals a row of aether-imbued spines to spear the mouths of those who would feed upon it. Unfortunately, this form of protection does rely on already being inside the predator's mouth to be effective, which comes as too little, too late in most cases.
